utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Remember I had to leave the room the other day when you had that roast chicken ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah . But I thought that was because I put the whole thing on my hand and made it walk across the table .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Anyway , it just does not seem worth it to make a whole turkey for just three people . Okay ? It is a lot of work .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But you gotta have turkey on Thanksgiving !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I mean , Thanksgiving with no turkey is like ... like Fourth of July with no apple pie !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Or Friday with no two pizzas !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All right fine ! If it means that much to you ! But just ... there is gonna be a ton left over .

emotion_cause.span: 7_there is gonna be a ton left over .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No there will not ! I promise I will finish that turkey !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All right , you are telling me you can eat an entire turkey in just one sitting ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_you can eat an entire turkey in just one sitting ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And this is what we do !
